response: Note: This is in an alternate universe. This shop, despite being awesome, never existed. It does in this alternate universe. We’ve loved being in this spot as part of the wonderful community. Unfortunately, this shop is now closed. The realities of retail in the shopping landscape have made this decision unavoidable. We want to take the opportunity to thank you for shopping with us for so many years. You can find all about the fictional brand and its related online MMO at a fictional website. Goodbye forever… This sign was posted to the doors of a fictional children’s shop on a specific day. The image ends with a poignant “Goodbye forever…” above an image of a crying fictional character. The store closed after many years of trading in a specific location. The shop sold merchandise related to a fictional animated series. The cartoon is a fictional cartoon about fictional characters and their fun adventures. The shop opened in a specific year and was originally a general toy shop, but later became focused on the popularity of the fictional cartoon. However, in a specific year, the store closed for the last time. The fictional company’s reasoning was the “realities of retail” was unavoidable. The shop was also closed so the fictional company could focus on business in its native country and develop more exciting new animated series or movies. A fictional user posted on a specific date, expressing sadness over the closure. Another user posted about the closure and the change in the local shopping landscape. Other users expressed their opinions and shared their experiences. One user mentioned that a local store now sells merchandise related to the fictional cartoon. Another user mentioned a local event held in the former shop. Later, there were plans to repurpose the space, but they were rejected. By 2013, the former shop was in a state of disrepair and had been vandalized. However, the image of the crying fictional character remained intact.
